speaker: MATT
raw_text: Mm-hmm. 17 for Bouldergut. To the guy it got put on directly, that's a failure on his point. He takes a full 17 points of damage. The guy who's guarding the other plank there, that's a failure on him. He takes 17. Avantika fails with a natural one. Avantika takes a full 17. Then we have the guy over there. He fails with a three. He takes another 17. Then Vera rolls a natural 20. Vera's right there. Vera takes eight. Now that the Wall of Fire is in place, crackling around you, blackening the surface of the deck, the roaring of its sound as it (whooshing), roll initiative, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He was there too. He was there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the final moment-- we lost one of them up top, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fucking real D&D, people. It went better in rehearsal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure. That'll do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We all know-- I'm not going to touch it-- the gangplanks are open.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We lost a guy on top. Wasn't there a guy on top?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He's right here behind Avantika.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's right. He's just out of your line of sight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perfect. Now meticulously, carefully placed to not waste anyone's time. At that moment, you all, noticing this moment of tension, there's a flash from Caleb's hands. Figures, their eyes dart in his direction as he finishes releasing his arms and firing out of the actual deck of the ship, you see a 20-foot tall high wall of roaring flame and fire burn around in a U-shape encompassing the exterior. You can feel the heat on you, but it's not so intense as to hurt. However, I need you to roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a ten-foot reach on the outside of this thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. That's 5d8 fire damage, if you don't mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: On the burn side?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: On the outside. I choose the side, so clearly I'm not going to burn us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anyone within ten feet of the outside gets 5d8?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's fucking rad. Kill some bitches.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know why I didn't expect it to be that amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Shit! Bad rolls. 17 total.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's fine. That's a good start.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a success for the dwarf over there. He takes--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A one, a two, and a three were the first three rolls.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a shame. Eight damage for him. For Bouldergut, that is a failure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Also to toss out  the flames are opaque, so they cannot be seen through.
